items.en: This formulation may be helpful for focusing only on those interactions which are most relevant for the downstream task, especially when the input entities were a set, from which a graph was formed by adding all possible edges between them.
items.zh: 这种形式可能有助于只关注那些对下游任务最相关的交互，特别是当输入实体是一个集合，通过添加所有可能的边从中形成图时。

items.en: Vaswani et al., (2017)’s multi-headed self-attention mechanism adds an interesting feature, where the ϕesuperscriptitalic-ϕ𝑒\phi^{e} and ρe→vsuperscript𝜌→𝑒𝑣\rho^{e\rightarrow v} are implemented by a parallel set of functions, whose results are concatenated together as the final step of ρe→vsuperscript𝜌→𝑒𝑣\rho^{e\rightarrow v}. This can be interpreted as using typed edges, where the different types index into different ϕesuperscriptitalic-ϕ𝑒\phi^{e} component functions, analogous to Li et al., (2016).
items.zh: Vaswani等人（2017）的多头自注意力机制增加了一个有趣的特征，其中ϕ^e和ρ^{e→v}由一组并行函数实现，其结果在ρ^{e→v}的最后一步拼接在一起。这可以解释为使用类型化边，其中不同的类型索引到不同的ϕ^e组件函数，类似于Li等人（2016）。

items.en: For details and various NLNN architectures, see the Appendix.
items.zh: 有关详细信息和各种NLNN架构，请参见附录。

items.en: The full GN (Equation 2) can be used to predict a full graph, or any subset of (𝐮′,V′,E′)superscript𝐮′superscript𝑉′superscript𝐸′\left(\mathbf{u}^{\prime},V^{\prime},E^{\prime}\right), as outlined in Section 4.1.1. For example, to predict a global property of a graph, V′superscript𝑉′V^{\prime} and E′superscript𝐸′E^{\prime} can just be ignored. Similarly, if global, node, or edge attributes are unspecified in the inputs, those vectors can be zero-length, i.e., not taken as explicit input arguments. The same idea applies for other GN variants which do not use the full set of mapping (ϕitalic-ϕ\phi) and reduction (ρ𝜌\rho) functions. For instance, Interaction Networks (Battaglia et al.,, 2016; Watters et al.,, 2017) and the Neural Physics Engine (Chang et al.,, 2017) use a full GN but for the absence of the global to update the edge properties (see Appendix for details).
items.zh: 完整的GN（方程2）可用于预测完整图，或(u', V', E')的任何子集，如第4.1.1节所述。例如，要预测图的全局属性，可以忽略V'和E'。类似地，如果输入中未指定全局、节点或边属性，这些向量可以为零长度，即不作为显式输入参数。同样的想法适用于其他不使用完整映射（ϕ）和归约（ρ）函数集的GN变体。例如，交互网络（Battaglia等人，2016；Watters等人，2017）和神经物理引擎（Chang等人，2017）使用完整的GN，但缺少全局更新边属性（详见附录）。

items.en: Various models, including CommNet (Sukhbaatar et al.,, 2016), structure2vec (Dai et al.,, 2016) (in the version of (Dai et al.,, 2017)), and Gated Graph Sequence Neural Networks (Li et al.,, 2016) have used a ϕesuperscriptitalic-ϕ𝑒\phi^{e} which does not directly compute pairwise interactions, but instead ignore the receiver node, operating only on the sender node and in some cases an edge attribute. This can be expressed by implementations of ϕesuperscriptitalic-ϕ𝑒\phi^{e} with the following signatures, such as:
items.zh: 各种模型，包括CommNet（Sukhbaatar等人，2016）、structure2vec（Dai等人，2016）（在Dai等人（2017）的版本中）和门控图序列神经网络（Li等人，2016），使用了不直接计算成对交互的ϕ^e，而是忽略接收节点，仅对发送节点和某些情况下的边属性进行操作。这可以通过实现具有以下签名的ϕ^e来表达，例如：

items.en: Relation Networks (Raposo et al.,, 2017; Santoro et al.,, 2017) bypass the node update entirely and predict the global output from pooled edge information directly (see also Figure 4(e)),
items.zh: 关系网络（Raposo等人，2017；Santoro等人，2017）完全绕过节点更新，直接从池化的边信息预测全局输出（另见图4(e)），

items.en: Deep Sets (Zaheer et al.,, 2017) bypass the edges update completely and predict the global output from pooled nodes information directly (Figure 4(f)),
items.zh: Deep Sets（Zaheer等人，2017）完全绕过边更新，直接从池化的节点信息预测全局输出（图4(f)）。

items.en: PointNet (Qi et al.,, 2017) use similar update rule, with a max-aggregation for ρv→usuperscript𝜌→𝑣𝑢\rho^{v\rightarrow u} and a two-step node update.
items.zh: PointNet（Qi 等人，2017）使用类似的更新规则，其中 ρ^{v→u} 采用最大聚合，节点更新分为两步。

items.en: A key design principle of graph networks is constructing complex architectures by composing GN blocks. We defined a GN block as always taking a graph comprised of edge, node, and global elements as input, and returning a graph with the same constituent elements as output (simply passing through the input elements to the output when those elements are not explicitly updated). This graph-to-graph input/output interface ensures that the output of one GN block can be passed as input to another, even if their internal configurations are different, similar to the tensor-to-tensor interface of the standard deep learning toolkit. In the most basic form, two GN blocks, GN1subscriptGN1\mathrm{GN}_{1} and GN2subscriptGN2\mathrm{GN}_{2}, can be composed as GN1∘GN2subscriptGN1subscriptGN2\mathrm{GN}_{1}\circ\mathrm{GN}_{2} by passing the output of the first as input to the second: G′=GN2​(GN1​(G))superscript𝐺′subscriptGN2subscriptGN1𝐺G^{\prime}=\mathrm{GN}_{2}(\mathrm{GN}_{1}(G)).
items.zh: 图网络的一个关键设计原则是通过组合 GN 块来构建复杂架构。我们将 GN 块定义为始终以包含边、节点和全局元素的图作为输入，并返回具有相同组成元素的图作为输出（当这些元素未被显式更新时，直接将输入元素传递到输出）。这种图到图的输入/输出接口确保了一个 GN 块的输出可以作为另一个 GN 块的输入，即使它们的内部配置不同，类似于标准深度学习工具包中的张量到张量接口。在最基本的形式中，两个 GN 块 GN1 和 GN2 可以通过将第一个块的输出作为第二个块的输入来组合为 GN1∘GN2：G' = GN2(GN1(G))。

可以组合任意数量的 GN 块，如图 6(a) 所示。这些块可以是不共享的（不同的函数和/或参数，类似于 CNN 的层），GN1 ≠ GN2 ≠ ... ≠ GNM，或者是共享的（重复使用的函数和参数，类似于展开的 RNN），GN1 = GN2 = ... = GNM。图 6(a) 中 GNcore 周围的白色方框表示 M 次重复的内部处理子步骤，使用共享或不共享的 GN 块。共享配置类似于消息传递（Gilmer 等人，2017），其中相同的局部更新过程被迭代应用以在结构上传播信息（图 7）。如果我们排除全局变量 u（它聚合来自节点和边的信息），经过 m 步传播后节点能够访问的信息由距离最多 m 跳的节点和边集合决定。这可以解释为将复杂计算分解为更小的基本步骤。这些步骤也可以用于捕获时间上的顺序性。在我们的球-弹簧示例中，如果每个传播步骤预测一个时间步长 Δt 内的物理动力学，那么 M 个传播步骤将产生总模拟时间 M·Δt。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Example of message passing. Each row highlights the information that diffuses through the graph starting from a particular node. In the top row, the node of interest is in the upper right; in the bottom row, the node of interest is in the bottom right. Shaded nodes indicate how far information from the original node can travel in m𝑚m steps of message passing; bolded edges indicate which edges that information has the potential to travel across. Note that during the full message passing procedure, this propagation of information happens simultaneously for all nodes and edges in the graph (not just the two shown here).
items.capZh: 图 7：消息传递示例。每一行突出显示从特定节点开始通过图扩散的信息。在第一行中，感兴趣的节点位于右上角；在最后一行中，感兴趣的节点位于右下角。阴影节点表示来自原始节点的信息在 m 步消息传递中可以传播多远；粗体边表示信息可能跨越的边。请注意，在整个消息传递过程中，这种信息传播同时发生在图中的所有节点和边上（不仅仅是这里显示的两个）。

items.en: A common architecture design is what we call the encode-process-decode configuration (Hamrick et al., (2018); also see Figure 6(b)a): an input graph, Ginpsubscript𝐺inpG_{\textrm{inp}} is transformed into a latent representation, G0subscript𝐺0G_{0}, by an encoder, GNencsubscriptGNenc\text{GN}_{\textrm{enc}}; a shared core block, GNcoresubscriptGNcore\text{GN}_{\textrm{core}}, is applied M𝑀M times to return GMsubscript𝐺𝑀G_{M}; and finally an output graph, Goutsubscript𝐺outG_{\textrm{out}}, is decoded by GNdecsubscriptGNdec\text{GN}_{\textrm{dec}}. For example, in our running example, the encoder might compute the initial forces and interaction energies between the balls, the core might apply an elementary dynamics update, and the decoder might read out the final positions from the updated graph state.
items.zh: 一种常见的架构设计是我们所谓的编码-处理-解码配置（Hamrick 等人，2018；另见图 6(b)a）：输入图 Ginp 由编码器 GNenc 转换为潜在表示 G0；共享核心块 GNcore 应用 M 次以返回 GM；最后输出图 Gout 由 GNdec 解码。例如，在我们的运行示例中，编码器可能计算球之间的初始力和相互作用能，核心可能应用基本动力学更新，解码器可能从更新后的图状态中读出最终位置。

items.en: Similar to the encode-process-decode design, recurrent GN-based architectures can be built by maintaining a hidden graph, Ghidtsubscriptsuperscript𝐺𝑡hidG^{t}_{\textrm{hid}}, taking as input an observed graph, Ginptsubscriptsuperscript𝐺𝑡inpG^{t}_{\textrm{inp}}, and returning an output graph, Gouttsubscriptsuperscript𝐺𝑡outG^{t}_{\textrm{out}}, on each step (see Figure 6(c)). This type of architecture can be particularly useful for predicting sequences of graphs, such as predicting the trajectory of a dynamical system over time (e.g. Sanchez-Gonzalez et al.,, 2018). The encoded graph, output by GNencsubscriptGNenc\text{GN}_{\textrm{enc}}, must have the same structure as Ghidtsubscriptsuperscript𝐺𝑡hidG^{t}_{\textrm{hid}}, and they can be easily combined by concatenating their corresponding 𝐞ksubscript𝐞𝑘\mathbf{e}_{k}, 𝐯isubscript𝐯𝑖\mathbf{v}_{i}, and 𝐮𝐮\mathbf{u} vectors (where the upward arrow merges into the left-hand horizontal arrow in Figure 6(c)), before being passed to GNcoresubscriptGNcore\textrm{GN}_{\textrm{core}}. For the output, the Ghidtsubscriptsuperscript𝐺𝑡hidG^{t}_{\textrm{hid}} is copied (where the right-hand horizontal arrow splits into the downward arrow in Figure 6(c)) and decoded by GNdecsubscriptGNdec\textrm{GN}_{\textrm{dec}}. This design reuses GN blocks in several ways: GNencsubscriptGNenc\textrm{GN}_{\textrm{enc}}, GNdecsubscriptGNdec\textrm{GN}_{\textrm{dec}}, and GNcoresubscriptGNcore\textrm{GN}_{\textrm{core}} are shared across each step, t𝑡t; and within each step, GNcoresubscriptGNcore\textrm{GN}_{\textrm{core}} may perform multiple shared sub-steps.
items.zh: 与编码-处理-解码设计类似，基于循环 GN 的架构可以通过维护隐藏图 Ghid^t 来构建，每一步接收观测图 Ginp^t 并返回输出图 Gout^t（见图 6(c)）。这种架构对于预测图序列特别有用，例如预测动力系统随时间变化的轨迹（例如 Sanchez-Gonzalez 等人，2018）。由 GNenc 输出的编码图必须与 Ghid^t 具有相同的结构，并且可以通过连接它们对应的 e_k、v_i 和 u 向量（在图 6(c) 中，向上的箭头合并到左侧的水平箭头）轻松组合，然后传递给 GNcore。对于输出，Ghid^t 被复制（在图 6(c) 中，右侧的水平箭头分裂为向下的箭头）并由 GNdec 解码。这种设计以多种方式重用 GN 块：GNenc、GNdec 和 GNcore 在每一步 t 中共享；并且在每一步内，GNcore 可能执行多个共享的子步骤。

items.en: Various other techniques for designing GN-based architectures can be useful. Graph skip connections, for example, would concatenate a GN block’s input graph, Gmsubscript𝐺𝑚G_{m}, with its output graph, Gm+1subscript𝐺𝑚1G_{m+1}, before proceeding to further computations. Merging and smoothing input and hidden graph information, as in Figure 6(c), can use LSTM- or GRU-style gating schemes, instead of simple concatenation (Li et al.,, 2016). Or distinct, recurrent GN blocks (e.g. Figure 4(b)) can be composed before and/or after other GN blocks, to improve stability in the representations over multiple propagation steps (Sanchez-Gonzalez et al.,, 2018).
items.zh: 其他各种设计基于 GN 的架构的技术也可能有用。例如，图跳跃连接会将 GN 块的输入图 Gm 与其输出图 Gm+1 连接起来，然后再进行进一步计算。如图 6(c) 所示，合并和平滑输入和隐藏图信息可以使用 LSTM 或 GRU 风格的门控方案，而不是简单的连接（Li 等人，2016）。或者，不同的循环 GN 块（例如图 4(b)）可以在其他 GN 块之前和/或之后组合，以提高多个传播步骤中表示的稳定性（Sanchez-Gonzalez 等人，2018）。

items.en: Similar to CNNs (see Figure 1), which are naturally parallelizable (e.g. on GPUs), GNs have a natural parallel structure: since the ϕesuperscriptitalic-ϕ𝑒\phi^{e} and ϕvsuperscriptitalic-ϕ𝑣\phi^{v} functions in Equation 1 are shared over the edges and nodes, respectively, they can be computed in parallel. In practice, this means that with respect to ϕesuperscriptitalic-ϕ𝑒\phi^{e} and ϕvsuperscriptitalic-ϕ𝑣\phi^{v}, the nodes and edges can be treated like the batch dimension in typical mini-batch training regimes. Moreover, several graphs can be naturally batched together by treating them as disjoint components of a larger graph. With some additional bookkeeping, this allows batching together the computations made on several independent graphs.
items.zh: 与 CNN（见图 1）类似，GN 具有自然的并行结构：由于公式 1 中的 φ^e 和 φ^v 函数分别在边和节点上共享，因此它们可以并行计算。实际上，这意味着对于 φ^e 和 φ^v，节点和边可以像典型小批量训练中的批次维度一样处理。此外，多个图可以通过将它们视为更大图的不相交组件来自然地批处理在一起。通过一些额外的簿记，这允许将多个独立图上的计算批处理在一起。

items.en: Reusing ϕesuperscriptitalic-ϕ𝑒\phi^{e} and ϕvsuperscriptitalic-ϕ𝑣\phi^{v} also improves GNs’ sample efficiency. Again, analogous to a convolutional kernel, the number of samples which are used to optimize a GN’s ϕesuperscriptitalic-ϕ𝑒\phi^{e} and ϕvsuperscriptitalic-ϕ𝑣\phi^{v} functions is the number of edges and nodes, respectively, across all training graphs. For example, in the balls example from Sec. 3.2, a scene with four balls which are all connected by springs will provide twelve (4×3434\times 3) examples of the contact interaction between them.
items.zh: 重用 φ^e 和 φ^v 也提高了 GN 的样本效率。再次类似于卷积核，用于优化 GN 的 φ^e 和 φ^v 函数的样本数量分别是所有训练图中边和节点的数量。例如，在第 3.2 节的球示例中，一个包含四个由弹簧连接的球的场景将提供十二个（4×3）接触相互作用的示例。

items.en: We have released an open-source software library for building GNs, which can be found here: github.com/deepmind/graph_nets. See Box 4.3 for an overview.
items.zh: 我们已经发布了一个用于构建 GN 的开源软件库，可以在这里找到：github.com/deepmind/graph_nets。概述见框 4.3。

items.en: In this section, we have discussed the design principles behind graph networks: flexible representations, configurable within-block structure, and composable multi-block architectures. These three design principles combine in our framework which is extremely flexible and applicable to a wide range of domains ranging from perception, language, and symbolic reasoning. And, as we will see in the remainder of this paper, the strong relational inductive bias possessed by graph networks supports combinatorial generalization, thus making it a powerful tool both in terms of implementation and theory.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们讨论了图网络背后的设计原则：灵活的表示、可配置的块内结构以及可组合的多块架构。这三个设计原则在我们的框架中结合在一起，该框架非常灵活，适用于从感知、语言到符号推理的广泛领域。并且，正如我们将在本文其余部分看到的，图网络拥有的强关系归纳偏置支持组合泛化，从而使其在实现和理论方面都成为一个强大的工具。

items.en: In this paper, we analyzed the extent to which relational inductive bias exists in deep learning architectures like MLPs, CNNs, and RNNs, and concluded that while CNNs and RNNs do contain relational inductive biases, they cannot naturally handle more structured representations such as sets or graphs. We advocated for building stronger relational inductive biases into deep learning architectures by highlighting an underused deep learning building block called a graph network, which performs computations over graph-structured data. Our graph network framework unifies existing approaches that also operate over graphs, and provides a straightforward interface for assembling graph networks into complex, sophisticated architectures.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们分析了 MLP、CNN 和 RNN 等深度学习架构中关系归纳偏置的程度，并得出结论：虽然 CNN 和 RNN 确实包含关系归纳偏置，但它们无法自然处理更结构化的表示，如集合或图。我们主张通过强调一个未被充分利用的深度学习构建块——图网络——来构建更强的关系归纳偏置到深度学习架构中，该构建块对图结构数据进行计算。我们的图网络框架统一了现有的在图上的方法，并提供了一个简单的接口来将图网络组装成复杂、精密的架构。

items.en: The structure of GNs naturally supports combinatorial generalization because they do not perform computations strictly at the system level, but also apply shared computations across the entities and across the relations as well. This allows never-before-seen systems to be reasoned about, because they are built from familiar components, in a way that reflects von Humboldt’s “infinite use of finite means” (Humboldt,, 1836; Chomsky,, 1965).
items.zh: GN 的结构自然支持组合泛化，因为它们不仅严格在系统级别执行计算，还在实体和关系上应用共享计算。这使得可以推理从未见过的系统，因为它们由熟悉的组件构建而成，反映了冯·洪堡的“有限手段的无限使用”（Humboldt，1836；Chomsky，1965）。

items.en: A number of studies have explored GNs’ capacity for combinatorial generalization. Battaglia et al., (2016) found that GNs trained to make one-step physical state predictions could simulate thousands of future time steps, and also exhibit accurate zero-shot transfer to physical systems with double, or half, the number of entities experienced during training. Sanchez-Gonzalez et al., (2018) found similar results in more complex physical control settings, including that GNs trained as forward models on simulated multi-joint agents could generalize to agents with new numbers of joints. Hamrick et al., (2018) and Wang et al., 2018b each found that GN-based decision-making policies could transfer to novel numbers of entities as well. In combinatorial optimization problems, Bello et al., (2016); Nowak et al., (2017); Dai et al., (2017); Kool and Welling, (2018) showed that GNs could generalize well to problems of much different sizes than they had been trained on. Similarly, Toyer et al., (2017) showed generalization to different sizes of planning problems, and Hamilton et al., (2017) showed generalization to producing useful node embeddings for previously unseen data. On boolean SAT problems, Selsam et al., (2018) demonstrated generalization both to different problem sizes and across problem distributions: their model retained good performance upon strongly modifying the distribution of the input graphs and its typical local structure.
items.zh: 许多研究探索了 GN 的组合泛化能力。Battaglia 等人（2016）发现，训练用于一步物理状态预测的 GN 可以模拟数千个未来时间步，并且还能准确零样本迁移到实体数量为训练时两倍或一半的物理系统。Sanchez-Gonzalez 等人（2018）在更复杂的物理控制设置中发现了类似的结果，包括作为前向模型在模拟多关节智能体上训练的 GN 可以泛化到具有新关节数量的智能体。Hamrick 等人（2018）和 Wang 等人（2018b）各自发现基于 GN 的决策策略可以迁移到新的实体数量。在组合优化问题中，Bello 等人（2016）、Nowak 等人（2017）、Dai 等人（2017）、Kool 和 Welling（2018）表明 GN 可以很好地泛化到与训练时大小差异很大的问题。类似地，Toyer 等人（2017）展示了到不同规模规划问题的泛化，Hamilton 等人（2017）展示了为未见数据生成有用节点嵌入的泛化。在布尔 SAT 问题上，Selsam 等人（2018）展示了到不同问题大小和跨问题分布的泛化：他们的模型在强烈修改输入图分布及其典型局部结构时仍保持良好的性能。

items.en: These striking examples of combinatorial generalization are not entirely surprising, given GNs’ entity- and relation-centric organization, but nonetheless provide important support for the view that embracing explicit structure and flexible learning is a viable approach toward realizing better sample efficiency and generalization in modern AI.
items.zh: 这些组合泛化的显著例子并不完全令人惊讶，考虑到 GN 的实体和关系中心组织，但它们仍然为以下观点提供了重要支持：拥抱显式结构和灵活学习是实现现代 AI 中更好样本效率和泛化的可行途径。

items.en: One limitation of GNs’ and MPNNs’ form of learned message-passing (Shervashidze et al.,, 2011) is that it cannot be guaranteed to solve some classes of problems, such as discriminating between certain non-isomorphic graphs. Kondor et al., (2018) suggested that covariance888Covariance means, roughly, that the activations vary in a predictable way as a function of the ordering of the incoming edges. (Cohen and Welling,, 2016; Kondor and Trivedi,, 2018), rather than invariance to permutations of the nodes and edges is preferable, and proposed “covariant compositional networks” which can preserve structural information, and allow it to be ignored only if desired.
items.zh: GN 和 MPNN 形式的学习消息传递（Shervashidze 等人，2011）的一个局限性是它不能保证解决某些类别的问题，例如区分某些非同构图。Kondor 等人（2018）建议协变性（大致意思是激活值随输入边顺序以可预测的方式变化）（Cohen 和 Welling，2016；Kondor 和 Trivedi，2018）优于对节点和边排列的不变性，并提出了“协变组合网络”，它可以保留结构信息，并且仅在需要时忽略它。

items.en: More generally, while graphs are a powerful way of representing structure information, they have limits. For example, notions like recursion, control flow, and conditional iteration are not straightforward to represent with graphs, and, minimally, require additional assumptions (e.g., in interpreting abstract syntax trees). Programs and more “computer-like” processing can offer greater representational and computational expressivity with respect to these notions, and some have argued they are an important component of human cognition (Tenenbaum et al.,, 2011; Lake et al.,, 2015; Goodman et al.,, 2015).
items.zh: 更一般地说，虽然图是表示结构信息的一种强大方式，但它们也有局限性。例如，递归、控制流和条件迭代等概念并不容易用图来表示，并且至少需要额外的假设（例如，在解释抽象语法树时）。程序和更“类似计算机”的处理可以在这些概念方面提供更大的表示和计算表达能力，有些人认为它们是人类认知的重要组成部分（Tenenbaum 等，2011；Lake 等，2015；Goodman 等，2015）。

items.en: Although we are excited about the potential impacts that graph networks can have, we caution that these models are only one step forward. Realizing the full potential of graph networks will likely be far more challenging than organizing their behavior under one framework, and indeed, there are a number of unanswered questions regarding the best ways to use graph networks.
items.zh: 尽管我们对图网络可能产生的影响感到兴奋，但我们提醒，这些模型只是前进的一步。实现图网络的全部潜力可能远比将它们的行为组织在一个框架下更具挑战性，事实上，关于使用图网络的最佳方式还有许多未解的问题。

items.en: One pressing question is: where do the graphs come from that graph networks operate over? One of the hallmarks of deep learning has been its ability to perform complex computations over raw sensory data, such as images and text, yet it is unclear the best ways to convert sensory data into more structured representations like graphs. One approach (which we have already discussed) assumes a fully connected graph structure between spatial or linguistic entities, such as in the literature on self-attention (Vaswani et al.,, 2017; Wang et al., 2018c, ). However, such representations may not correspond exactly to the “true” entities (e.g., convolutional features do not directly correspond to objects in a scene). Moreover, many underlying graph structures are much more sparse than a fully connected graph, and it is an open question how to induce this sparsity. Several lines of active research are exploring these issues (Watters et al.,, 2017; van Steenkiste et al.,, 2018; Li et al.,, 2018; Kipf et al.,, 2018) but as of yet there is no single method which can reliably extract discrete entities from sensory data. Developing such a method is an exciting challenge for future research, and once solved will likely open the door for much more powerful and flexible reasoning algorithms.
items.zh: 一个紧迫的问题是：图网络所操作的图从何而来？深度学习的一个标志是它能够对原始感官数据（如图像和文本）执行复杂计算，但将感官数据转换为更结构化的表示（如图）的最佳方式尚不清楚。一种方法（我们已经讨论过）假设空间或语言实体之间具有全连接图结构，例如自注意力文献中所述（Vaswani 等，2017；Wang 等，2018c）。然而，这种表示可能并不完全对应于“真实”实体（例如，卷积特征并不直接对应于场景中的物体）。此外，许多底层图结构比全连接图稀疏得多，如何引入这种稀疏性是一个开放问题。几条活跃的研究线正在探索这些问题（Watters 等，2017；van Steenkiste 等，2018；Li 等，2018；Kipf 等，2018），但迄今为止还没有一种方法能够可靠地从感官数据中提取离散实体。开发这样一种方法对未来研究来说是一个令人兴奋的挑战，一旦解决，很可能为更强大、更灵活的推理算法打开大门。

items.en: A related question is how to adaptively modify graph structures during the course of computation. For example, if an object fractures into multiple pieces, a node representing that object also ought to split into multiple nodes. Similarly, it might be useful to only represent edges between objects that are in contact, thus requiring the ability to add or remove edges depending on context. The question of how to support this type of adaptivity is also actively being researched, and in particular, some of the methods used for identifying the underlying structure of a graph may be applicable (e.g. Li et al.,, 2018; Kipf et al.,, 2018).
items.zh: 一个相关的问题是如何在计算过程中自适应地修改图结构。例如，如果一个物体碎裂成多个碎片，表示该物体的节点也应该分裂成多个节点。类似地，可能只表示接触物体之间的边是有用的，因此需要根据上下文添加或删除边的能力。如何支持这种自适应性的问题也在积极研究中，特别是，一些用于识别图底层结构的方法可能适用（例如 Li 等，2018；Kipf 等，2018）。

items.en: Human cognition makes the strong assumption that the world is composed of objects and relations (Spelke and Kinzler,, 2007), and because GNs make a similar assumption, their behavior tends to be more interpretable. The entities and relations that GNs operate over often correspond to things that humans understand (such as physical objects), thus supporting more interpretable analysis and visualization (e.g., as in Selsam et al.,, 2018). An interesting direction for future work is to further explore the interpretability of the behavior of graph networks.
items.zh: 人类认知强烈假设世界由物体和关系组成（Spelke 和 Kinzler，2007），由于 GN 做出类似假设，它们的行为往往更可解释。GN 操作的实体和关系通常对应于人类理解的事物（如物理物体），从而支持更可解释的分析和可视化（例如，如 Selsam 等，2018）。未来工作的一个有趣方向是进一步探索图网络行为的可解释性。

full.sec: 5.4 Integrative approaches for learning and structure
full.secZh: 5.4 学习与结构的整合方法

items.en: While our focus here has been on graphs, one takeaway from this paper is less about graphs themselves and more about the approach of blending powerful deep learning approaches with structured representations. We are excited by related approaches which have explored this idea for other types of structured representations and computations, such as linguistic trees (Socher et al., 2011a, ; Socher et al., 2011b, ; Socher et al.,, 2012, 2013; Tai et al.,, 2015; Andreas et al.,, 2016), partial tree traversals in a state-action graph (Guez et al.,, 2018; Farquhar et al.,, 2018), hierarchical action policies (Andreas et al.,, 2017), multi-agent communication channels (Foerster et al.,, 2016), “capsules” (Sabour et al.,, 2017), and programs (Parisotto et al.,, 2017). Other methods have attempted to capture different types of structure by mimicking key hardware and software components in computers and how they transfer information between each other, such as persistent slotted storage, registers, memory I/O controllers, stacks, and queues (e.g. Dyer et al.,, 2015; Grefenstette et al.,, 2015; Joulin and Mikolov,, 2015; Sukhbaatar et al.,, 2015; Kurach et al.,, 2016; Graves et al.,, 2016).
items.zh: 虽然我们这里的重点是图，但本文的一个启示与其说是关于图本身，不如说是关于将强大的深度学习方法与结构化表示相结合的方法。我们对相关方法感到兴奋，这些方法已经探索了其他类型的结构化表示和计算的想法，例如语言树（Socher 等，2011a；Socher 等，2011b；Socher 等，2012，2013；Tai 等，2015；Andreas 等，2016）、状态-动作图中的部分树遍历（Guez 等，2018；Farquhar 等，2018）、分层动作策略（Andreas 等，2017）、多智能体通信通道（Foerster 等，2016）、“胶囊”（Sabour 等，2017）和程序（Parisotto 等，2017）。其他方法试图通过模仿计算机中的关键硬件和软件组件以及它们之间如何传输信息来捕获不同类型的结构，例如持久槽存储、寄存器、内存 I/O 控制器、栈和队列（例如 Dyer 等，2015；Grefenstette 等，2015；Joulin 和 Mikolov，2015；Sukhbaatar 等，2015；Kurach 等，2016；Graves 等，2016）。

items.en: Recent advances in AI, propelled by deep learning, have been transformative across many important domains. Despite this, a vast gap between human and machine intelligence remains, especially with respect to efficient, generalizable learning. We argue for making combinatorial generalization a top priority for AI, and advocate for embracing integrative approaches which draw on ideas from human cognition, traditional computer science, standard engineering practice, and modern deep learning. Here we explored flexible learning-based approaches which implement strong relational inductive biases to capitalize on explicitly structured representations and computations, and presented a framework called graph networks, which generalize and extend various recent approaches for neural networks applied to graphs. Graph networks are designed to promote building complex architectures using customizable graph-to-graph building blocks, and their relational inductive biases promote combinatorial generalization and improved sample efficiency over other standard machine learning building blocks.
items.zh: 由深度学习推动的人工智能最新进展在许多重要领域具有变革性。尽管如此，人类和机器智能之间仍然存在巨大差距，特别是在高效、可泛化的学习方面。我们认为将组合泛化作为人工智能的首要任务，并倡导采用整合方法，借鉴人类认知、传统计算机科学、标准工程实践和现代深度学习的思想。在这里，我们探索了灵活的学习方法，这些方法实现了强大的关系归纳偏置，以利用显式结构化的表示和计算，并提出了一个称为图网络的框架，该框架概括并扩展了最近应用于图的神经网络的各种方法。图网络旨在使用可定制的图到图构建块来促进复杂架构的构建，其关系归纳偏置促进了组合泛化，并提高了相对于其他标准机器学习构建块的样本效率。

items.en: Despite their benefits and potential, however, learnable models which operate on graphs are only a stepping stone on the path toward human-like intelligence. We are optimistic about a number of other relevant, and perhaps underappreciated, research directions, including marrying learning-based approaches with programs (Ritchie et al.,, 2016; Andreas et al.,, 2016; Gaunt et al.,, 2016; Evans and Grefenstette,, 2018; Evans et al.,, 2018), developing model-based approaches with an emphasis on abstraction (Kansky et al.,, 2017; Konidaris et al.,, 2018; Zhang et al.,, 2018; Hay et al.,, 2018), investing more heavily in meta-learning (Wang et al.,, 2016; Wang et al., 2018a, ; Finn et al.,, 2017), and exploring multi-agent learning and interaction as a key catalyst for advanced intelligence (Nowak,, 2006; Ohtsuki et al.,, 2006). These directions each involve rich notions of entities, relations, and combinatorial generalization, and can potentially benefit, and benefit from, greater interaction with approaches for learning relational reasoning over explicitly structured representations.
items.zh: 然而，尽管图网络有其优势和潜力，但可学习的图操作模型只是通往类人智能道路上的一个垫脚石。我们对其他一些相关且可能被低估的研究方向持乐观态度，包括将学习方法与程序结合（Ritchie 等，2016；Andreas 等，2016；Gaunt 等，2016；Evans 和 Grefenstette，2018；Evans 等，2018）、开发强调抽象性的基于模型的方法（Kansky 等，2017；Konidaris 等，2018；Zhang 等，2018；Hay 等，2018）、加大对元学习的投入（Wang 等，2016；Wang 等，2018a；Finn 等，2017），以及探索多智能体学习和交互作为高级智能的关键催化剂（Nowak，2006；Ohtsuki 等，2006）。这些方向都涉及丰富的实体、关系和组合泛化概念，并且可能受益于与显式结构化表示上的关系推理学习方法的更多互动。
